cases.title: Normal turn smoke test
cases.description: A short two-speaker handoff for validating ElevenLabs generation.

speaker_a.text: That should give us enough time to review the numbers before the client call.
speaker_a.instruction: A composed adult male voice finishing a practical workplace comment. Use a natural complete sentence ending with final intonation.

speaker_b.text: Do you want me to update the deck after that?
speaker_b.instruction: A helpful adult male colleague asking a straightforward follow-up question. Begin naturally after the previous speaker finishes.

cases.alignment_notes: Try starting B 150 to 500 ms after A ends.
